mapping.reasoning: Payroll represents employee compensation costs, which maps to labor_costs in the Income Statement category

Rent is typically classified as a General & Administrative expense in P&L statements. Given the hierarchy context showing this is below Gross Profit and near other operating expenses, it's part of G&A rather than general opex
Software expenses are typically operating expenses. No specific software canonical exists, so mapping to general operating expenses (opex)
Legal & Professional fees are typically classified as General & Administrative expenses, which maps to general_admin
On Cash sheet at hierarchy level 1, this likely represents the same total operating expenses concept, though context suggests it may be used for cash flow purposes
